content:
# Provenance

**Summary**: Broad research theme addressed in the thesis collection.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016]] contributed to the theme of Provenance

- [[2022-radwan|Radwan, 2022]] used QCI as a tool to determine the provenance of Arabian sandstones and sands.

- [[1999-babalola|Babalola, 1999]] analyzed the provenance of the Wajid Sandstone using heavy mineral analysis and geochemistry.

## Key Subtopics



- [[2022-radwan|Radwan, 2022]] used QCI as a tool to determine the provenance of Arabian sandstones and sands.

- [[1999-babalola|Babalola, 1999]] analyzed the provenance of the Wajid Sandstone using heavy mineral analysis and geochemistry.

## Methods and Approaches Used



## Key Findings Across Sources

- contributed to the theme of Provenance ([[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016]])

- QCI has successfully distinguished between quartz forming under different crystallization conditions including temperature, pressure, rate of crystallization, and age. ([[2022-radwan|Radwan, 2022, p. 32]])

- Provenance was determined through Q-mode factor and cluster analyses of heavy minerals. ([[1999-babalola|Babalola, 1999, p. 93]])
